28.reason: [Error: When the stack is full, the program prints "error " but still pushes the element, which is incorrect. The push should be skipped when the stack is full.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When the stack is full, the push operation should not be performed after printing "error". The code prints "error" but still calls push(), which will cause a stack overflow by writing beyond the array bounds.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Error: push is executed even when stack is full, causing overflow]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  // push called even when stack is full; should be conditional
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Logical error: push is called unconditionally even when the stack is full. It should be placed in an else block to prevent buffer overflow.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  The push operation is executed unconditionally even when the stack is full, causing out-of-bounds access. It should be placed in an else block or skipped.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  // Error: Push is executed even when stack is full. Should only push if not full.
